front: What are BigQuery's three partitioning strategies and when would you choose each?
back: Time-based partitioning uses a DATE/TIMESTAMP column and is ideal for event or log data queried by date range. Range partitioning divides data by an integer column (e.g., customer_id buckets) for numeric segmentation. Ingestion-time partitioning uses the load timestamp automatically, useful when source data has no reliable date column. All three reduce scan costs by pruning irrelevant partitions.
